title: Featured

fields.label: Featured article
fields.name: is_featured
fields.instructions: Tick to feature this post in the featured zone at the top of /en/blog/. WordPress's built-in sticky-post mechanism does not apply to custom post types, so this ACF flag plus a Query Loop filter (functions.php) drives the EN featured zone instead.

description: Adds an is_featured boolean to English blog posts. Ticked posts appear in the featured zone of /en/blog/. The Query Loop filter that reads this meta key lives in functions.php (gvb_filter_en_blog_featured_query).
